acceptance_targets: [chapter_09_booker_001] PASS if each replay block between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:281 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:383, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:432 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:447, introduces a distinct new consequence (not just a higher loop count); FAIL if the revised passage still presents three near-identical replay/count cycles with no new external stake.

[chapter_09_craft_001] PASS if each confrontation segment between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:165 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:181, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:404 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:430, sustains emotional consequence for at least the next two dialogue turns before returning to logistics; FAIL if either segment pivots immediately from disclosure to compliance talk with no intervening consequence beat.

[chapter_09_dialogue_001] PASS if each revised mini-exchange between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:171 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:181, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:249 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:257, contains a clear leverage shift visible on the page; FAIL if turns remain yes/no procedural checks with no shift in stakes.

[chapter_09_dialogue_002] PASS if, between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:404 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:430, at least five of six untagged dialogue lines remain attributable to the correct speaker by diction and rhythm alone; FAIL if the exchange still reads as interchangeable procedural voice.

[chapter_09_prose_001] PASS if revised non-log paragraphs between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:79 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:447 use embodied transition cues as the default and reserve explicit clock-stamp openings for genuinely plot-critical beats; FAIL if repeated "At/By + time" openings still dominate scene transitions.

[chapter_09_prose_002] PASS if the revised Ravi-focused band between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:117 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:336 avoids repetitive comparative scaffolding and each image adds non-redundant meaning; FAIL if three or more "as if" clauses remain in the same narrative function.

[chapter_09_prose_003] PASS if the revised spans between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:243 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:290, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:370 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:383, still include logging but also include at least two clearly non-metric stress beats that alter reader understanding of Anika's state; FAIL if stress is still represented almost exclusively through counts and compliance fields.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each replay block between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:281 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:383, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:432 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:447, introduces a distinct new consequence (not just a higher loop count); FAIL if the revised passage still presents three near-identical replay/count cycles with no new external stake.
findings.problem: The core voicemail-compulsion beat is dramatized repeatedly with similar action (replay, count, log) but limited new external consequence, so the middle-to-late chapter loses forward drive before the Chapter 10 handoff.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten one replay cycle and convert another into an irreversible causal turn between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:281 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:383, plus between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:432 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:447 (for example: missed prep requirement, concrete rehab setback, or a changed next-day plan that cannot be undone in-scene).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each confrontation segment between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:165 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:181, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:404 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:430, sustains emotional consequence for at least the next two dialogue turns before returning to logistics; FAIL if either segment pivots immediately from disclosure to compliance talk with no intervening consequence beat.
findings.problem: Sanitization-by-deflection: major emotional exposures are quickly neutralized by procedural checklists, creating a moral safety-valve effect that drains immediate dramatic heat instead of forcing the scene to sit in discomfort.
findings.rewrite_direction: Between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:165 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:181, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:404 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:430, keep the procedural language but insert one embodied, unresolved emotional or behavioral aftershock before the checklist pivot (silence rupture, admission, refusal, or concrete action with social cost).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each revised mini-exchange between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:171 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:181, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:249 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:257, contains a clear leverage shift visible on the page; FAIL if turns remain yes/no procedural checks with no shift in stakes.
findings.problem: Multiple exchanges slip into transcript cadence (checklist prompt -> minimal answer) without enough leverage shift, flattening conflict pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the exchange between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:171 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:181, plus the exchange between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:249 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:257, so at least one line in each mini-exchange reframes power (challenge, boundary, or changed plan) rather than only confirming compliance.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:404 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:430, at least five of six untagged dialogue lines remain attributable to the correct speaker by diction and rhythm alone; FAIL if the exchange still reads as interchangeable procedural voice.
findings.problem: In the final negotiation, Anika and Ravi converge into similar compliance-jargon rhythm, weakening idiolect separation at a key scene pivot.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate speaker texture between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:404 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:430: keep Ravi in imperative/work-scheduling shorthand and keep Anika in sensory plus count-driven stress language so lines remain distinguishable even without tags.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised non-log paragraphs between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:79 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:447 use embodied transition cues as the default and reserve explicit clock-stamp openings for genuinely plot-critical beats; FAIL if repeated "At/By + time" openings still dominate scene transitions.
findings.problem: Paragraph lead-ins repeatedly rely on clock-time framing ("At/By..."), turning temporal control into a visible prose formula rather than a selectively deployed effect.
findings.rewrite_direction: Between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:79 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:105, between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:292, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:370 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:447, retain only plot-critical timestamps and shift other transitions to sensory/action pivots.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised Ravi-focused band between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:117 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:336 avoids repetitive comparative scaffolding and each image adds non-redundant meaning; FAIL if three or more "as if" clauses remain in the same narrative function.
findings.problem: The repeated "as if" comparison scaffold appears four times in one chapter band and reads as an autopilot sentence template.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:169 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:185, plus at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:336, to replace most comparative scaffolding with direct physical/sensory detail, keeping only the single strongest simile.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised spans between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:243 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:290, and between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:370 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:383, still include logging but also include at least two clearly non-metric stress beats that alter reader understanding of Anika's state; FAIL if stress is still represented almost exclusively through counts and compliance fields.
findings.problem: Mechanical overuse of count/log lexicon (metrics, loops, timestamps, score-like entries) begins to feel like literal checklist execution rather than evolving interior texture.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the notebook motif but diversify stress rendering between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:243 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:290, plus between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:370 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:383, by adding at least two non-numeric interior beats (body memory, associative thought, or self-judgment not framed as a metric).

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
